China's Lian Junjie and Yang Hao compete in the men's synchronized 10m platform diving final at the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on July 29, 2024. PHOTO: SEBASTIEN BOZON / AFP

Top athletes from China put their abilities on display on the third day of the Paris Olympics, shining on the world stage in a variety of competitions.

China's Lian Junjie and Yang Hao celebrate with their gold medals following the men's synchronized 10m platform diving at the Paris 2024 Olympic Games at the Aquatics Centre in Saint-Denis, north of Paris, on July 29, 2024. SEBASTIEN BOZON / AFP

ChinaГўВҖВҷs Lian Junjie and Yang Hao were awarded Olympic gold medals after winning the menГўВҖВҷs synchronized 10m platform diving at the Paris Olympics on July 29, 2024.

ChinaГўВҖВҷs Xu Jiayu won silver in the MenГўВҖВҷs 100 meter backstroke final. Xu previously won two silver medals in the 2016 Olympic games and was the first male swimmer from China to win a medal in the backstroke.

ChinaГўВҖВҷs Tang Qianting reacts after taking silver in the final of the womenГўВҖВҷs 100m breaststroke swimming event during the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on July 29, 2024. PHOTO: JONATHAN NACKSTRAND / AFP

ChinaГўВҖВҷs world champion Tang Qianting won the silver medal in the 100 meters breaststroke as South AfricaГўВҖВҷs Tatjana Smith received the countryГўВҖВҷs first gold of the Paris Olympics.

Second-placed ChinaГўВҖВҷs team, winner JapanГўВҖВҷs team and third-placed USA team celebrate during the podium ceremony for the artistic gymnastics menГўВҖВҷs team final during the Paris 2024 Olympic Games at the Bercy Arena in Paris, on July 29, 2024. PHOTO: LOIC VENANCE / AFP

Team China also took the silver medal in the menГўВҖВҷs team gymnastics.

Defending champion Cheung Ka-long of Hong Kong, China, won gold and retained his title in menГўВҖВҷs foil, beating first-time Olympian Filippo Macchi of Italy 15-14 in a disputed bout.

ChinaГўВҖВҷs womenГўВҖВҷs volleyball team advanced with a 3-2 victory in the preliminary round, over its first opponent, the U.S., on Monday, July 29.

ChinaГўВҖВҷs Wang Chuqin (L) and ChinaГўВҖВҷs Sun Yingsha (R) play a return to South KoreaГўВҖВҷs Lim Jonghoon and South KoreaГўВҖВҷs Shin Yubin during their mixed table tennis doubles semifinals at the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on July 29, 2024. PHOTO: JUNG YEON-JE / AFP

Wang Chuqin and Sun Yingsha secured a 4-2 victory over Lim Jong-hoon and Shin Yu-bin of South Korea in the table tennis mixed doubles semifinals on Monday. They will advance to play Ri Jong-sik and Kim Kum-yong of DPRK in the finals.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.

title: ChinaГўВҖВҷs top athletes shine on day three of Paris Olympics - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: Top athletes from China put their abilities on display on the third day of the Paris Olympics, shining on the world stage in a variety of competitions.
